query:
SELECT p.name, p.code, s.name as strain, t.name as tent, p.plantStage, p.status
FROM plants p
JOIN strains s ON p.strainId = s.id
LEFT JOIN tents t ON p.currentTentId = t.id
ORDER BY p.id;
